title: Glass Sphere & Refraction
blurb: Refraction in motion: a depth-of-field focus rack through the scene, and a glass sphere morphing into a lens. Both are animated WebP loops.

cards.title: Depth of Field - focus rack
cards.desc: A thin-lens camera racking focus through the scene: from a soft foreground, onto the refractive glass sphere, then onto the reflective sphere and box behind it.
cards.meta: 480x480  -  17 frames (animated WebP)  -  10x10 lens samples/pixel  -  2 min 55 s, 10.3 s/frame

cards.title: Sphere to Lens (animated)
cards.desc: A blue glass sphere flattened into a camera-facing lens by ramping its affine matrix. Refraction through a transformed primitive, tumbling through an edge-on view.
